name: Secrets of the Silent School
short_description: Secrets of the Silent School is a first-person horror game where players control a drone to investigate an abandoned Japanese school. Collect data to uncover the truth hidden within its haunted halls, while using your camera to capture and destroy vengeful ghosts.
detailed_description:
Synopsis:

Secrets of the Silent School is a first-person horror game where players control a drone to investigate an abandoned Japanese school. Collect data to uncover the truth hidden within its haunted halls, while using your camera to capture and destroy vengeful ghosts.

Description:

Years after a tragic massacre in the school, the government has launched a covert investigation to uncover what really happened.

You are the Operator, remotely controlling a drone tasked with collecting data and surviving nightly missions inside the haunted school. But the spirits trapped within are not passive. They are watching. They are angry.

Features:

- Capture ghosts with your camera to destroy them

- Collect data to uncover the truth. Reach 50% or face a bad ending.

- Limited time each night. 15 minutes to explore, and survive.

- Atmospheric horror inspired by Japanese folklore.

- Discover notes written by the victims and piece together the mystery.

- Two different endings: Good and Bad.
